hero.motto: Let positive energy flow, attract endless blessings
hero.description: FluxBless curates premium blessing accessories containing natural healing energies. We specialize in ancient colored glaze, natural agate, selected cinnabar, and white jade to bring harmony, fortune, and inner peace to your daily life.

product.sizingDesc: Our bracelets feature slight elasticity, fitting most wrist sizes (14cm-18cm). For custom sizing, please contact customer support.

checkout.title: Secure Checkout
checkout.error: Failed to initialize payment. Please try again.

success.title: Blessing Attracted! Thank you for your order.
success.message1: Your payment was successful and order is locked. Positive energy is gathering for you.
success.message2: We will package and ship your blessed accessory as soon as possible. Your order receipt and tracking details will be sent to your email.
success.blessing: May positive energy flow, attracting endless blessings. May harmony and good fortune accompany you always!
